name: Stuffed Courgettes (England)
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the courgettes in half lengthways.
2. Cook the courgette halves in boiled, salted water for four to ten minutes.
3. Drain the courgettes in a colander and let them cool.
4. Scoop out the insides of the courgettes and place them in a bowl.
5. Add the eggs, crumbled brown bread, grated cheese, garlic salt, salt, and pepper to the bowl.
6. Mix well and return the mixture back into the courgette halves.
7. Heat olive oil and butter in a frying pan.
8. Fry the stuffed courgettes for about five minutes on each side until browned.
9. Serve immediately as an appetizer or with cold meat and new potatoes.
Serves 2.
